narrative:
Ada South (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,058 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
